node.text: dinner and a show? @courtneyodonnell

looks like somebody’s making the holidays all about himself again. Grinch Meal out 12.2
chat i was so not chill

node.text: one take queen

the reunion I’ve been waiting for...
take a trip to get the mcdonaldland meal 8.12
get urself ready for a trip 8.12
two faves in one?? 🎀🐢 try to get ‘em with the @tmnt x @hellokitty and friends Happy Meal out 8.12
my McNuggets fell asleep on the beach
send this to your ex
straw hat crew rise up, snack wraps are sailing the grand line #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECEDAY
who are u introducing to mom?
u did it. happy snack wrap day
snack wrap rises tomorrow at lunch
the best thing on the breakfast menu is now spicy
tag that couple
showing my mcnugget buddy fireworks for the 1st time
my worst nightmare
